name: windows-tools-install-manager
description: Standardize installs of system-level Windows tools (ffmpeg, 7zip, OCR engines, CLIs, GUI apps) to a configurable root with user-scope PATH auto-management. Self-configuring on first use.

interface.shortDescription: Install system-level Windows tools to one configurable root, with PATH auto-management.
interface.longDescription: Standardizes how AI agents install system-level Windows tools (ffmpeg, 7zip, tesseract, gh CLI, OBS, etc.) to a single user-configurable root directory. Auto-adds installed tools to user-scope PATH, enforces user confirmation before every install, prefers portable / silent-install methods with custom path flags, and excludes Python packages (those go to the sister skill miniconda-python-env).
